subcodes.first_line: O ye ancient friends and the maidservants of the Merciful Lord! Upon ye be Baha'u'llah and His light
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران قدیم و اماء رب کریم علیکم بهاء الله و نوره و الطاف یوم ظهوره و علیکم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @martyrs and martyrdom
